description: Create a point map in Epi Info 7 showing the locations of positive West Nile Virus mosquito pools in Chicago using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\Chicago_WNV_Tests.csv. Filter the map to display only records where the RESULT is 'positive' and save the output as wnv_positive_map.png in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\ folder.
